services.title: Software development services
services.subtitle: We cover the full cycle — from idea and design to release and support
services.s1_desc: iOS, Android and cross-platform: React Native, Flutter, KMP, Swift, Kotlin. From MVP to a full product.
services.s2_desc: Next.js, React, Vue — SaaS products, corporate sites and admin panels with SEO from day one.
services.s3_desc: CI/CD, monitoring, fault tolerance, scaling. We build a reliable foundation for your product.
services.s4_desc: Process automation, integrations with CRM, ERP and internal systems.
services.s5_desc: Python (Django, FastAPI), PHP (Symfony, Laravel), Go. Microservice architecture and APIs.
services.s6_desc: Code review, architecture audit, performance optimization and tech-debt reduction.
services.s7_desc: A dedicated developer or team for your project. We integrate into your processes and tools.
services.cta_card_text: Didn't find the service you need? Let's discuss your task — we'll find a solution.

faq.title: Software development FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.q1: How much does app development cost?
faq.a1: Cost depends on scale and stack. A small MVP starts from $2,500, a full product is quoted individually. We give a detailed estimate after the brief, with no hidden fees.
faq.a2: MVP in 4–8 weeks, a full-cycle product from 3 months. We give realistic timelines and stick to them.
faq.a3: Yes, it's our standard. We sign NDA before any project discussions begin.
faq.a4: We fix scope and deadlines in the contract. Bugs found after delivery are fixed for free during the warranty period.
faq.q5: Can you join an existing project?
faq.a5: Yes, outstaffing of developers is one of our core directions. We integrate a developer or team into your processes and tools.
faq.a6: We offer support packages: monitoring, quick fixes, planned updates. Terms are discussed individually.

cta.title: Let's discuss your project?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your task — we'll respond with an estimate within 1 business day.
